'''rayasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smackaroons|smackaroons]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-y-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smackaroons|smackaroons]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rayasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræyæsæth|ræyæsæth]] || [[word:ræyæsæj|ræyæsæj]] || [[word:ræyæsæsh|ræyæsæsh]] || [[word:ræyæsæ|ræyæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rayayasath|rayayasath]] || [[word:rayayasaj|rayayasaj]] || [[word:rayayasash|rayayasash]] || [[word:rayayasa|rayayasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rayasath|rayasath]] || [[word:rayasaj|rayasaj]] || [[word:rayasash|rayasash]] || [[word:rayasa|rayasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rayafsath|rayafsath]] || [[word:rayafsaj|rayafsaj]] || [[word:rayafsash|rayafsash]] || [[word:rayafsaf|rayafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rayasatha|rayasatha]] || [[word:rayasaja|rayasaja]] || [[word:rayasasha|rayasasha]] || [[word:rayasaka|rayasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rayasath|rayasath]] || [[word:rayasaj|rayasaj]] || [[word:rayasash|rayasash]] || [[word:rayasa|rayasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rayasathal|rayasathal]] || [[word:rayasajal|rayasajal]] || [[word:rayasashal|rayasashal]] || [[word:rayasakal|rayasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rayasathatha|rayasathatha]] || [[word:rayasajaja|rayasajaja]] || [[word:rayasashasha|rayasashasha]] || [[word:rayasaka|rayasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rayasathan|rayasathan]] || [[word:rayasajan|rayasajan]] || [[word:rayasashan|rayasashan]] || [[word:rayasakan|rayasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rayasathaoro|rayasathaoro]] || [[word:rayasajaoro|rayasajaoro]] || [[word:rayasashaoro|rayasashaoro]] || [[word:rayasakaoro|rayasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
